creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
CC'ed Koop Mast (kwm@) because Greybird must be synchronized with Gtk+ versions (see [1] for more details).

To Marko, I'm former maintainer of Greybird theme, as I'm using Xfce, this port install only Gtk and xfwm themes for this desktop, but GNOME Shell is also available, feel free to update my patch,if you need it. 

[1] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Gnome/Development
